name: Staff of Control (Greater)
description:
An array of dazzling gemstones lines the twisting head of the golden staff. While wielding the staff, you gain a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to make a .

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.
